about_text:
I am Virgile Popote, a freelance web developer in Guadeloupe, specialized in creating modern and high-performing websites.

My role: designing custom showcase websites and web applications, designed to be aesthetic, fast and SEO optimized.

Thanks to my skills in UI/UX design and development (Ruby on Rails, React, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS), I create intuitive platforms that showcase your brand and convert your visitors into customers.

Passionate about digital, I support entrepreneurs, associations and startups in developing their online presence and standing out from the competition.

👉 Looking for a reliable partner for your web project? Contact me and let's bring your idea to life.

ruby.title: Ruby
ruby.description: Allows rapid development of dynamic websites and robust applications, thanks to a simple and intuitive syntax. Used especially with the Rails framework for high-performance web platforms.

react.title: React
react.description: Facilitates the creation of interactive and modern user interfaces for the web, offering fast and responsive experiences.

tailwind.title: Tailwind
tailwind.description: Speeds up the design of responsive and modern sites thanks to utility classes, allowing you to customize the design without writing much CSS.

wordpress.title: Wordpress
wordpress.description: Ideal for easily creating and managing a website, blog, or online store, even without advanced technical knowledge.

figma.title: Figma
figma.description: Online tool for designing mockups, prototypes, and collaborating efficiently between designers and developers.

shopify.title: Shopify
shopify.description: Turnkey solution to launch an online store, manage payments and inventory, without requiring technical skills.

items.description: Platform for finding food trucks and caterers in Switzerland. Easily find mobile catering services for all types of events.
A CRM for a startup that allows you to manage leads and sales opportunities.

contactform.title: Get in touch?
contactform.subtitle: I will do my best to reply as soon as possible.
contactform.success_text: Thank you for your message. I will get back to you as soon as possible.
